description.value: Aura moderate varies; CL 9th; Slot none; Price 34,200 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This length of hemlock-shrouded oak gives off the faintest whiff of rot and corruption. It allows use of the following spells: Stinking cloud (1 charge) Cloudkill (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells cloudkill, stinking cloud; Cost 17,100 gp.
